backstory.original: Relentlessly brave but markedly uncouth, Briv Steelmarrow is a stalwart champion of the weak, innocent, downtrodden, and oppressed. Centuries ago, a cabal of Netherese mages experimented on Briv's clan, gifting him with a magical metal inside his bones that he can pull through his skin and shape for attack or defense. Once a bloodthirsty raider, Briv sought atonement by joining the Order of the Lost Cause, an elite group of knights that travel across Faerûn, taking on quests that only fools would pursue.
backstory.display: 布里夫·钢髓勇敢无畏，但又不苟言笑。他是弱者、无辜者和被压迫者的坚定靠山。几个世纪前，一群耐瑟瑞尔法师在布里夫的部族进行了实验，在他的骨骼中赋予了他一种神奇金属。他可以通过皮肤拉出这种金属，用于攻击或防御。布里夫曾是一个嗜血的劫掠者，通过加入“失落事业骑士团”来寻求救赎。这是一个由骑士组成的精英团体，他们穿越费伦，接受那些只有傻瓜才会做的任务。

description.original: Briv cleaves a random enemy with his greatsword. Each enemy hit has a 20% chance of being taunted, switching its target to Briv.
description.display: 布里夫用他的大剑顺劈一名随机敌人。被命中的敌人有 20% 几率被嘲讽，将其攻击目标切换为布里夫。

longDescription.original: Briv cleaves a random enemy with his greatsword. Each enemy hit has a 20% chance of being taunted, switching its target to Briv.
longDescription.display: 布里夫用他的大剑顺劈一名随机敌人。被命中的敌人有 20% 几率被嘲讽，将其攻击目标切换为布里夫。

description.original: Briv forces all of his remaining Netherese Metal out of his body, damaging enemies that it passes through.
description.display: 布里夫将剩余的耐瑟钢逼出体外，对穿过的所有敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Briv forces all of his remaining Netherese Metal out of his body, shooting it out in an arc in front of him and damaging all enemies that it passes through. He then draws it all back into himself, dealing double damage to enemies that it hits on its way back.
longDescription.display: 布里夫将剩余的耐瑟钢逼出体外，向自身前方的弧形范围发射，对穿过的所有敌人造成伤害。随后他会将耐瑟钢再吸回体内，对返回时命中的敌人造成双倍伤害。

description.original: Whenever Briv comes under attack metal shoots out of his pores and covers him in strong armor. Hits he takes while armored increase Champion damage.
description.display: 每当布里夫受到攻击时，会从毛孔中释放出金属，化作坚硬的护甲对他进行保护。处于护甲状态时受到攻击会提升勇士的伤害。

description.original: Briv has a chance of sprinting forward quickly on steel-springs after completing a new area, skipping the next area entirely.
description.display: 在完成一个新区域后，布里夫有几率使用钢丝弹簧迅速向前冲刺，彻底跳过下一个区域。

description.desc: Whenever Briv comes under attack metal shoots out of his pores and covers him in strong armor. While armored, Briv takes $amount___2% less damage and gains stacks of Steelbones whenever he is hit by an enemy attack.
布里夫受到攻击时，会从毛孔中释放出金属，化作坚硬的护甲对他进行保护。处于装甲状态时，布里夫受到的伤害减少 $amount___2%，并且在每次被敌人击中时会堆叠钢骨状态

tipText.original: Briv stores power whenever he takes damage and uses it to buff the party and Sprint forward.
tipText.display: 布里夫每次受到伤害时都会储存能量，并用来强化队伍及向前冲刺。

description.desc: Briv increases the damage of all Champions behind him by $(not_buffed amount)% for each stack of Steelbones he has gained.
布里夫每获得一层钢骨堆叠层数，就为处于他身后的所有勇士提高 $(not_buffed amount)% 的伤害

conditions.desc: Briv has a chance of sprinting forward quickly on steel-springs after completing a new area. This action consumes $stack_consume_percent% of his Sprint stacks, and requires at least $required_stacks stacks to occur. When you reset the adventure, all stacks of Steelbones that Briv has gained convert into stacks of Sprint. Unused Sprint stacks persist through resets.^$unnatural_haste_description

Briv sprints forward quickly on steel-springs after completing a new area, skipping the next $guaranteed_skip_amount areas entirely; Briv has a $skip_chance% chance to skip the next $skip_amount areas instead.  This action consumes $stack_consume_percent% of his Sprint stacks, and requires at least $required_stacks stacks to occur.^$unnatural_haste_description

Briv sprints forward quickly on steel-springs after completing a new area, skipping the next area entirely; Briv has a $skip_chance% to skip the next $skip_amount areas instead. This action consumes $stack_consume_percent% of his Sprint stacks, and requires at least $required_stacks stacks to occur.^$unnatural_haste_description

Briv has a $skip_chance% chance of sprinting forward quickly on steel-springs after completing a new area, skipping the next area entirely. This action consumes $stack_consume_percent% of his Sprint stacks, and requires at least $required_stacks stacks to occur.^$unnatural_haste_description
在完成一个新区域后，布里夫有几率使用钢丝弹簧迅速向前冲刺。此动作将消耗他冲刺堆叠层数的 $stack_consume_percent% ，并且至少需要 $required_stacks 层堆叠才能发动。当你重置冒险时，布里夫获得的所有钢骨层数都会转化为冲刺层数。未使用的冲刺层数重置冒险后会保留。^$unnatural_haste_description

在完成一个新区域后，布里夫会使用钢丝弹簧迅速向前冲刺，彻底跳过下 $guaranteed_skip_amount 个区域；布里夫有 $skip_chance% 几率跳过下 $skip_amount 个区域。此动作将消耗他冲刺堆叠层数的 $stack_consume_percent% ，并且至少需要 $required_stacks 层堆叠才能发动。^$unnatural_haste_description
在完成一个新区域后，布里夫会使用钢丝弹簧迅速向前冲刺，彻底跳过下一个区域；布里夫有 $skip_chance% 几率跳过下 $skip_amount 个区域。此动作将消耗他冲刺堆叠层数的 $stack_consume_percent% ，并且至少需要 $required_stacks 层堆叠才能发动。^$unnatural_haste_description
在完成一个新区域后，布里夫有 $skip_chance% 几率使用钢丝弹簧迅速向前冲刺，彻底跳过下一个区域。此动作将消耗他冲刺堆叠层数的 $stack_consume_percent% ，并且至少需要 $required_stacks 层堆叠才能发动。^$unnatural_haste_description

description.desc: Briv's pet flumph Phlo appears next to Briv and telepathically stores healing power whenever Briv is hit. After $hits_to_proc_heal hits or $time_to_proc_heal seconds, whichever comes first, Phlo heals all Champions in the party for $amount% of the damage Briv took during that time.^$healing_phlo_description
布里夫的宠物毛绒弗洛出现在布里夫身边，并利用心灵感应在布里夫被攻击时为其储存治愈能量。在布里夫被攻击 $hits_to_proc_heal 次或经过 $time_to_proc_heal 秒后（以先满足条件者为准），弗洛为队伍中的所有英雄回复布里夫当时所受到伤害的 $amount%^$healing_phlo_description

tipText.original: Briv's pet flumph, Phlo, tracks the damage that Briv takes and then heals the party using the tracked amount.
tipText.display: 布里夫的宠物毛绒弗洛追踪布里夫受到的伤害，然后根据追踪到的数值治疗队伍。

description.desc: Briv increases the max health of all other Champions by $amount% of his max health.
布里夫提升其他所有勇士的最大生命值，数值相当于他自身最大生命值的 $amount%
Unnatural Haste uses 20% less Sprint stacks whenever it procs (3.2% of stacks instead of 4% of stacks).
异常加速发动时，使用的冲刺堆叠层数减少 20%（使用 3.2% 堆叠层数代替 4% 堆叠层数）

specializationDescription.original: With more efficient use of his metal reserves, Briv can Sprint further on each run.
specializationDescription.display: 布里夫更高效地利用他的金属储备，在每个关卡中冲刺得更远。

specializationDescription.original: A lifetime of training allows Briv to buff his companions even further.
specializationDescription.display: 坚持不懈的训练让布里夫可以进一步强化他的伙伴。

specializationDescription.original: Briv's companion Phlo heals the party a larger percentage of the damage Briv takes.
specializationDescription.display: 布里夫的伙伴弗洛根据布里夫承受的伤害治疗队伍的比例提高。

description.original: Mine allies needeth assistance!
description.display: 我的盟友需要帮忙！

description.original: A half-orc champion leading the charge in glory.
description.display: 一个半兽人勇士，为了荣耀带头冲锋。

description.original: HA!
description.display: 哈！

description.original: Mine power is unmatched!
description.display: 我的力量，无可匹敌！

description.original: Mine blood floweth with the strength of mine enemies!
description.display: 我的鲜血，因敌人的力量而澎湃！

description.original: Who needeth a shield?
description.display: 谁需要盾牌？

description.original: We hath dealt with worse!
description.display: 我们经历过更糟的！

description.original: Thou wantest a fight? A fight ye shall have!
description.display: 你要战？那便战吧！

description.original: I shall take mine time.
description.display: 我会慢慢来。

effects.description: Caps Briv's Unnatural Haste ability at 100% chance to skip 4 areas.

description.original: Thou canst not deceive me! I am always ready to do battle!
description.display: 你骗不了我！我时刻都做好了战斗准备！

description.original: Everyone follow me - it's the only assured victory.
description.display: 所有人跟我来--只有这样才能赢。

description.original: Have at thee!
description.display: 看招！

description.original: Mine mighty legs could go farther, but there is wisdom in restraint.
description.display: 我强健的双腿本可以走得更远，但克制是有智慧的表现。

effects.description: Caps Briv's Unnatural Haste ability at 100% chance to skip 9 areas.

description.original: Mine mighty footfalls shalt resoundeth throughout all the land!
description.display: 我巨大的脚步声将响彻大地！

description.original: A true warrior leapeth only when he knoweth where he shall land.
description.display: 真正的战士只有在他知道他会在哪儿落地的情况下才会跳跃。

effects.description: Briv's Unnatural Haste will always skip the guaranteed number of areas, with no chance to skip an additional one

description.original: Mine durability rivaleth even Baatorian green steel!
description.display: 我的耐用程度甚至不逊于巴托青钢！

effects.description: Every third stack of Steelbones earned by Briv adds an additional stack.

description.original: ' tis mine now!
description.display: 现在是我的了！

description.original: Briv smiled as he raised it high above his head and shouted: 'Huzzah'!
description.display: 布里夫笑着把剑高举到头上喊道：“好哇”！

description.original: Thou dost need a savage paladin!
description.display: 你们需要的是一位拯救你们的圣武士！

description.original: If you see someone atop a griffon with this sword in hand, you should probably run.
description.display: 要是碰见手中握着此剑骑乘一头狮鹫的人出现，你或许该逃跑了。

description.original: Here friend. Consume and groweth stout like me.
description.display: 拿去吧朋友。多吃肉就会成长到我这样结实。

description.original: ' tis meat! Eat up, mine friends!
description.display: 这是肉！快吃吧，我的朋友们！

description.original: It shall increase thine constitution. Or killeth thee... Perhaps I should go first.
description.display: 它要么会为你补充营养。要么会要了你的命......或许还是我先来吧。

description.original: 'tis neither owl, nor bear. 'tis most wondrous!
description.display: 此物非枭亦非熊。此乃神物也！

description.original: Sweat? Nay. 'tis the steel of the Netherese!
description.display: 流汗？非也。此乃耐瑟之钢！

description.original: The steel floweth from mine pores when I needeth it for protection.
description.display: 当我需要保护时，我的毛孔就会流出钢铁。

description.original: A remnant of oppression, yet a talisman of mine own power. 'tis hard to reconcile.
description.display: 这既是受压迫留下来的残留物，同时也是我的护身符。真的很难调和。

description.original: Briv is one with the armor. The armor is one with Briv.
description.display: 布里夫与护甲合一。护甲与布里夫同在。

description.original: If thou canst pull a wagon, thou canst pull a Briv! Yah!
description.display: 你要是拉不动马车，那就拉不动布里夫！耶！

description.original: Stand fast steed. Thou may perish, but the stories they shall tell of thine demise!
description.display: 坚持住马儿。你或许会阵亡，但你牺牲的故事将会流传千古！

description.original: Diplomacy sometimes requireth a griffon abduction.
description.display: 有时候外交交涉会涉及到拐带狮鹫。

description.original: Dragon Rider. Check! Mine bucket list now lieth fallow.
description.display: 龙骑士。有！我的人生目标达成了。

description.original: ' tis bigger on the inside.
description.display: 里头的空间似乎更大。

description.original: Oh! 'tis just a pouch! I keep mine goblin trinkets inside.
description.display: 哦！这只是个小包而已！我都是用来收藏地精小饰品的。

description.original: Dost not all bags yell when opened? Oh. I shall remove the Hobgoblin.
description.display: 你们的包包打开时不会发出叫声的吗？哦我知道了。我忘了把大地精放出来。

description.original: ' tis mine own secret, not thine!
description.display: 这是我的私人秘密，不是你的！

description.original: I seeketh less talk and more action.
description.display: 我主张少说话多行动。

description.original: The Order 'tis as close to a family as I have had. Before now.
description.display: 在此之前，骑士团是我所拥有的最亲近的家庭了。

description.original: Mine spit has magical properties.
description.display: 我的吐息是有魔力的。

description.original: Mine challenges have led me to mine purpose.
description.display: 生命中的挑战引领我找到了我人生的目标。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Half-Orc Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Melee Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Relentlessly brave but markedly uncouth, Briv Steelmarrow is a stalwart champion of the weak, innocent, downtrodden, and oppressed. Centuries ago, a cabal of Netherese mages experimented on Briv's clan, gifting him with a magical metal inside his bones that he can pull through his skin and shape for attack or defense. Once a bloodthirsty raider, Briv sought atonement by joining the Order of the Lost Cause, an elite group of knights that travel across Faerûn, taking on quests that only fools would pursue.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Briv is a tanking Champion that powers up as he takes hits. That power is passed between resets and is used to enable a speed-up ability on the subsequent run.

event_upgrades.name: Steelbones
event_upgrades.description: Whenever Briv comes under attack metal shoots out of his pores and covers him in strong armor. Hits he takes while armored increase Champion damage.

event_upgrades.name: Unnatural Haste
event_upgrades.description: Briv has a chance of sprinting forward quickly on steel-springs after completing a new area, skipping the next area entirely.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 布里夫·钢髓勇敢无畏，但又不苟言笑。他是弱者、无辜者和被压迫者的坚定靠山。几个世纪前，一群耐瑟瑞尔法师在布里夫的部族进行了实验，在他的骨骼中赋予了他一种神奇金属。他可以通过皮肤拉出这种金属，用于攻击或防御。布里夫曾是一个嗜血的劫掠者，通过加入“失落事业骑士团”来寻求救赎。这是一个由骑士组成的精英团体，他们穿越费伦，接受那些只有傻瓜才会做的任务。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 布里夫为坦克型勇士，受到攻击时会获得能量。这种能量即使重置冒险后依然有效，并可用于在重置后的冒险中开启加速技能。

event_upgrades.name: 钢骨
event_upgrades.description: 每当布里夫受到攻击时，会从毛孔中释放出金属，化作坚硬的护甲对他进行保护。处于护甲状态时受到攻击会提升勇士的伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 异常加速
event_upgrades.description: 在完成一个新区域后，布里夫有几率使用钢丝弹簧迅速向前冲刺，彻底跳过下一个区域。

original.description: Briv cleaves a random enemy with his greatsword. Each enemy hit has a 20% chance of being taunted, switching its target to Briv.

display.name: 战术步伐
display.description: 我强健的双腿本可以走得更远，但克制是有智慧的表现。

original.name: Accurate Acrobatics
original.description: A true warrior leapeth only when he knoweth where he shall land.

effects.description: Briv's Unnatural Haste will always skip the guaranteed number of areas, with no chance to skip an additional one

display.name: 精确杂技
display.description: 真正的战士只有在他知道他会在哪儿落地的情况下才会跳跃。

effects.description: 布里夫的“异常加速”总是会跳过必定能跳过的区域数量，不会跳过额外的区域

original.name: Thunder Step
original.description: Mine mighty footfalls shalt resoundeth throughout all the land!

display.name: 雷霆步伐
display.description: 我巨大的脚步声将响彻大地！

original.name: Baatorian Bones
original.description: Mine durability rivaleth even Baatorian green steel!

effects.description: Every third stack of Steelbones earned by Briv adds an additional stack.

display.name: 巴托骸骨
display.description: 我的耐用程度甚至不逊于巴托青钢！

effects.description: 布里夫每获得三层“钢骨”堆叠会额外增加一层。

original.name: Found Sword
original.description: ' tis mine now!

display.name: 捡到的剑
display.description: 现在是我的了！

original.name: Greatsword
original.description: Briv smiled as he raised it high above his head and shouted: 'Huzzah'!

display.name: 巨剑
display.description: 布里夫笑着把剑高举到头上喊道：“好哇”！

original.name: Holy Avenger
original.description: Thou dost need a savage paladin!

display.name: 神圣复仇者
display.description: 你们需要的是一位拯救你们的圣武士！

original.name: Steadfast
original.description: If you see someone atop a griffon with this sword in hand, you should probably run.

display.name: 坚定不移
display.description: 要是碰见手中握着此剑骑乘一头狮鹫的人出现，你或许该逃跑了。

original.name: Stolen Meat
original.description: Here friend. Consume and groweth stout like me.

display.name: 偷来的肉
display.description: 拿去吧朋友。多吃肉就会成长到我这样结实。

original.name: Charred Meat
original.description: ' tis meat! Eat up, mine friends!

display.name: 烧焦的肉
display.description: 这是肉！快吃吧，我的朋友们！

original.name: Wight Steak
original.description: It shall increase thine constitution. Or killeth thee... Perhaps I should go first.

display.name: 尸妖肉排
display.description: 它要么会为你补充营养。要么会要了你的命......或许还是我先来吧。

original.name: Owlbear Steak
original.description: 'tis neither owl, nor bear. 'tis most wondrous!

display.name: 枭熊肉排
display.description: 此物非枭亦非熊。此乃神物也！

original.name: Liquid Steel
original.description: Sweat? Nay. 'tis the steel of the Netherese!

display.name: 液态钢铁
display.description: 流汗？非也。此乃耐瑟之钢！

original.name: Flowing Steel
original.description: The steel floweth from mine pores when I needeth it for protection.

display.name: 流动钢铁
display.description: 当我需要保护时，我的毛孔就会流出钢铁。

original.name: Netherese Steel
original.description: A remnant of oppression, yet a talisman of mine own power. 'tis hard to reconcile.

display.name: 耐瑟钢
display.description: 这既是受压迫留下来的残留物，同时也是我的护身符。真的很难调和。

original.name: Steelmarrow Armor
original.description: Briv is one with the armor. The armor is one with Briv.

display.name: 钢髓护甲
display.description: 布里夫与护甲合一。护甲与布里夫同在。

original.name: Draft Horse
original.description: If thou canst pull a wagon, thou canst pull a Briv! Yah!

display.name: 驮马
display.description: 你要是拉不动马车，那就拉不动布里夫！耶！

original.name: Riding Horse
original.description: Stand fast steed. Thou may perish, but the stories they shall tell of thine demise!

display.name: 坐骑马
display.description: 坚持住马儿。你或许会阵亡，但你牺牲的故事将会流传千古！

original.name: Spiral the Griffon
original.description: Diplomacy sometimes requireth a griffon abduction.

display.name: 狮鹫斯派乐
display.description: 有时候外交交涉会涉及到拐带狮鹫。

original.name: Theordynyrax
original.description: Dragon Rider. Check! Mine bucket list now lieth fallow.

display.name: 西奥丁莱斯
display.description: 龙骑士。有！我的人生目标达成了。

original.name: Unsuspecting Bag
original.description: ' tis bigger on the inside.

display.name: 不可疑的包
display.description: 里头的空间似乎更大。

original.name: Cinch Pouch
original.description: Oh! 'tis just a pouch! I keep mine goblin trinkets inside.

display.name: 腰包
display.description: 哦！这只是个小包而已！我都是用来收藏地精小饰品的。

original.name: Steelmarrow Pouch
original.description: Dost not all bags yell when opened? Oh. I shall remove the Hobgoblin.

display.name: 钢髓包
display.description: 你们的包包打开时不会发出叫声的吗？哦我知道了。我忘了把大地精放出来。

original.name: Briv's Bag of Secrets
original.description: ' tis mine own secret, not thine!

display.name: 布里夫的秘密之袋
display.description: 这是我的私人秘密，不是你的！

original.name: Tabard
original.description: I seeketh less talk and more action.

display.name: 战袍
display.description: 我主张少说话多行动。

original.name: Knightly Tabard
original.description: The Order 'tis as close to a family as I have had. Before now.

display.name: 骑士战袍
display.description: 在此之前，骑士团是我所拥有的最亲近的家庭了。

original.name: Symbol of the Fool
original.description: Mine spit has magical properties.

display.name: 愚人象征
display.description: 我的吐息是有魔力的。

original.name: Order of the Lost Cause
original.description: Mine challenges have led me to mine purpose.

display.name: 必败骑士团
display.description: 生命中的挑战引领我找到了我人生的目标。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位男性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Half-Orc Champions by $(amount)%
使所有半兽人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Melee Champions by $(amount)%
使所有近战勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
